entries.title: National Level Technical Paper Presentation
entries.description: Presented a national level technical paper on **Moletronics - An Invisible Technology** during my engineering studies.

entries.title: Robosapiens Workshop - Robotryst 2015
entries.description: My first coding experience — wrote code to flash into a robot for line following and object detection at the Robosapiens fundamentals of robotics and electronics workshop.

entries.title: B.Tech Final Project - Healthcare Monitoring
entries.description: Designed an **Emerging Technologies for Specific Patients Health Care Monitoring** system using Zigbee protocol and LTE messaging to decrease patient death rates due to lack of caretakers in emergency conditions.

entries.title: Graduated in Electronics and Communication Engineering
entries.description: Completed my B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering. From the 3rd year, I taught fellow students topics like Control Systems, Embedded Systems, Digital Signal Processing, and Microprocessors while working part-time to fund my education.

entries.title: PG Diploma in Embedded Systems - CDAC Kolkata
entries.description: Completed a Post Graduate Diploma in Embedded Systems Design at **CDAC Kolkata** with **Grade A**. My project involved developing a GPIO Device Driver on Linux for ARM to drive motors and LEDs.

entries.title: Continental Automotive - Graduate Engineer Trainee
entries.description: Joined **Continental Automotive** in the Vehicle Dynamics business unit. Automated the software milestone resource analysis process using Perl — extracting COSIPA data, generating reports, and updating internal webpages.

entries.title: Worldwide Resource Estimation Responsibility
entries.description: Promoted to Associate Engineer. Took worldwide responsibility for resource estimation across Asia, Germany, and the USA. Traveled to Germany to build the TB2015 control function database and estimate resources for MKC1 projects (Ford, BMW).

entries.title: Git Ambassador & Tricore Support
entries.description: Promoted to Executive Engineer. Became a Git Ambassador, training a 40-member team on GitHub workflows. Extended the resource estimation template to support new tricore microcontrollers. Fully automated testing, trace collection, report generation, and MKS check-in.

entries.title: GLIWA T1 Timing Analysis Integration
entries.description: Promoted to Senior Engineer. Traveled to Frankfurt for 3 months to integrate **GLIWA T1** timing analysis into the RTM component for Vector OS. Collected and analyzed timing parameters (gross execution time, response time, slack time, etc.) for vision control software across all global projects.

entries.title: Technical Architect - Python & Timing Analysis
entries.description: Promoted to Technical Architect. Developed a Python application to extract detailed timing data from GLIWA T1 enabled software — my first experience with Python and databases. Supported all projects worldwide with timing and scheduling analysis.

entries.title: Moved to Germany - Marquardt GmbH
entries.description: After 6.5 years at Continental (15 spot awards, consistently exceeding expectations), moved to Germany and joined **Marquardt GmbH** as an Advanced Software Development Engineer in the Rhine-Main Team. Started working on the SPLE platform (spl-core) and build automation.

entries.title: RAM/ROM Reporting & Build Extensions
entries.description: Introduced automated RAM/ROM consumption reporting into the build process — giving project teams resource visibility for the first time. Co-developed spl-build-extensions to automate post-processing artifact generation, replacing numerous manual scripts and saving approximately one day of manual work per project.

entries.title: Eliminating License Costs with Custom Python Tools
entries.description: Built custom Python tools to generate ODX/PDX/OUC artifacts and vFlashpacks, completely replacing expensive Vector tool licenses and eliminating recurring annual license costs for the company.

entries.title: SPLE Platform Trainer & AI Integration
entries.description: Co-conducted **10+ SPLE Platform Basic Training** sessions. Co-introduced AI-assisted development workflows for the SPLE platform, already adopted by teams achieving up to **85% code coverage** for legacy components in a single day.
